defaultFrameType.label: Default Frame Type
defaultFrameType.help: Protocol type used when adding new frames (can be overridden per catalog)

maxRegisterErrors.label: Max Consecutive Register Errors
maxRegisterErrors.help: Stop polling a register group after this many consecutive read errors. Set to 0 to retry indefinitely.

preventIdleSleep.label: Prevent idle sleep during active sessions
preventIdleSleep.help: Keep the system awake while a session is actively streaming data

keepDisplayAwake.label: Keep display awake during active sessions
keepDisplayAwake.help: Prevent the display from turning off while a session is active

logLevel.label: Log Level
logLevel.help: Diagnostic log verbosity. Logs are written to ~/Documents/WireTAP/Reports/

smpPort.label: SMP UDP Port
smpPort.help: Default port for SMP firmware upgrade over UDP

language.title: Language
language.label: Display Language
language.help: Language used throughout the WireTAP interface. Additional locales will appear here as they become available.

frameIdFormat.label: Frame ID Format
frameIdFormat.help: How CAN frame IDs are displayed in tables and exports

saveFrameIdFormat.label: Save Frame ID Format
saveFrameIdFormat.help: Format used when saving frames to file

decoderDir.label: Decoder Directory
decoderDir.help: Directory where decoder catalog files (.toml) are stored

dumpDir.label: Dump Directory
dumpDir.help: Directory where CAN bus dump files are stored

reportDir.label: Report Directory
reportDir.help: Default directory for exported analysis reports

saveFrameIdFormat.label: Save frame ID format
saveFrameIdFormat.help: Controls default decoder file names when saving/creating catalogs.

storage.title: Storage
storage.label: Capture Storage
storage.help: Storage backend for captured frame data and imported captures.

clearOnStart.label: Clear captures on start
clearOnStart.help: Delete all captured frame and byte data when the app launches. Disable to preserve capture data across sessions (uses disk space).

discoveryHistory.label: Discovery History Buffer
discoveryHistory.help: Maximum number of frames to keep in memory during CAN Discovery

queryResultLimit.label: Query Result Limit
queryResultLimit.help: Maximum number of results returned by database queries in the Query app

graphBuffer.label: Graph Buffer Size
graphBuffer.help: Samples per signal in graph ring buffers. Higher values show more history but use more memory.

maxUnmatched.label: Max Unmatched Frames
maxUnmatched.help: Maximum frames kept in the unmatched (no catalog match) list

maxFiltered.label: Max Filtered Frames
maxFiltered.help: Maximum frames kept in the filtered (excluded by selection set) list

maxDecoded.label: Max Decoded Frames
maxDecoded.help: Maximum decoded frames displayed in the Decoder view

maxDecodedPerSource.label: Max Decoded Per Source
maxDecodedPerSource.help: Maximum decoded frames cached per unique source address. Higher values keep more history but use more memory.

maxHistory.label: Max History Items
maxHistory.help: Maximum number of transmitted frames to keep in the Transmit history log

telemetry.label: Send anonymous crash reports
telemetry.help: Help improve WireTAP by sending anonymous crash and error reports via Sentry. No personal data, CAN bus data, or usage analytics are collected — only error stack traces.

empty.heading: No catalogs found in decoder directory
